subject: Possible GRB20030107 seen by SPI-ACS
body:
The ISDC Shift Team and the INTEGRAL SPI-ACS GRB team reports:

A possible GRB has been seen in the INTEGRAL SPI-ACS light curve on
2003-01-07 at 08:59:45.85 UT.  The duration of the GRB is very short at
approx. 200ms.  No position information is available.  The lightcurve is
available at
ftp://isdcarc.unige.ch/arc/FTP/ibas/spiacs/2003-01-07T08-59-45.0000-00000-00000-0.lc
